top_signals.title: Oil drops nearly 6% as two China-bound supertankers cross Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Brent crude falls to about $105 a barrel as Asia-bound vessels raise hopes of resumption of energy flows
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Farage, crypto and the £5mn gift
top_signals.summary: His rightwing populist Reform UK is uniquely reliant on a crypto billionaire
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Ben-Gvir condemned in Israel after video of European activists provokes outrage
top_signals.summary: Far-right minister’s taunting and humiliation of foreign nationals draws diplomatic blowback from western allies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SAAM Towage to Acquire Five New Tugs from Sanmar Shipyards
top_signals.summary: SAAM Towage, a leading provider of marine support services in the Americas, has signed an agreement with Türkiye-based Sanmar Shipyards to acquire five new tugboats. The vessels will be gradually added to its fleet as part of its investment…

top_signals.title: GO Searcher Multi-Purpose Vessel Returns to Guice Offshore Fleet
top_signals.summary: Guice Offshore, a leader in the offshore maritime mini supply vessel specialty market, announced the return of GO Searcher to its fleet, bringing the total number of Guice Offshore-owned vessels to 19.The GO Searcher, which has played a role in pioneering aerospace operations since 2014…
